name: Correct protocol in dns-prefetch for Google Tag Manager
expected: The dns-prefetch link for Google Tag Manager should use the 'https://' protocol to ensure secure and correct resource loading.

name: Correct protocol in dns-prefetch for Google Analytics
expected: The dns-prefetch link for Google Analytics should use the 'https://' protocol to ensure secure and correct resource loading.

name: HTML lang attribute present
expected: The <html> tag should specify the document language for improved accessibility and screen reader interpretation.

name: Viewport meta tag for responsiveness
expected: A properly configured viewport meta tag should be present for optimal responsive rendering across devices.

name: No plaintext password input types
expected: Password input fields should never use type='text' as it exposes credentials. They should always be type='password'.

name: Expected search input with type and placeholder
expected: A search input field (if present) should semantically use type='search' and ideally have a placeholder for user guidance.

name: Expected email input with type and required attribute
expected: An email input field (if present) should use type='email' and include the 'required' attribute for client-side validation.

name: Expected password input with correct type and autocomplete
expected: A password input field (if present) should use type='password' and specify 'autocomplete="current-password"' for better security and user experience.

name: Canonical link present
expected: A canonical link should be present in the <head> to prevent duplicate content issues and improve SEO.

name: Apple touch icon present
expected: An apple-touch-icon should be linked for improved PWA/bookmarking experience on iOS devices.

name: Web App Manifest linked
expected: A web app manifest file should be linked for Progressive Web App (PWA) features.

name: Meta description tag present and descriptive
expected: A descriptive meta description tag should be present to provide a summary for search engine results pages.
value: <meta name="description" content="Online Shopping Site for Fashion & Lifestyle in India.
